extension.summary: FENtastic Plus by Ivar Brandt, Zaxxon709 (Estuary MOD). Community fork maintained by JTCozart.
FENtastic Plus by Ivar Brandt, Zaxxon709 (Estuary MOD). Community fork maintained by JTCozart.
FENtastic Plus by Ivar Brandt, Zaxxon709 (Estuary MOD). Community fork maintained by JTCozart.
extension.description: FENtastic Plus is a community fork (maintained by JTCozart) of the FENtastic Plus skin by Ivar Brandt and Zaxxon709 - itself a modified version of the default Estuary skin for Kodi. It is intended for use with Fen Light, Red Light, The Gears, Umbrella, POV, TMDbH.[CR][CR]See [B]CHANGELOG[/B] located in Skin settings » Extra info for latest changes.

FENtastic Plus is a community fork (maintained by JTCozart) of the FENtastic Plus skin by Ivar Brandt and Zaxxon709 - itself a modified version of the default Estuary skin for Kodi. It is intended for use with Fen Light, Red Light, The Gears, Umbrella, POV, TMDbH.[CR][CR]See [B]CHANGELOG[/B] located in Skin settings » Extra info for latest changes.

FENtastic Plus is a community fork (maintained by JTCozart) of the FENtastic Plus skin by Ivar Brandt and Zaxxon709 - itself a modified version of the default Estuary skin for Kodi. It is intended for use with Fen Light, Red Light, The Gears, Umbrella, POV, TMDbH.[CR][CR]See [B]CHANGELOG[/B] located in Skin settings » Extra info for latest changes.

extension.summary: Install and auto-update the FENtastic Plus skin
extension.description: Repository add-on for the FENtastic Plus Kodi skin (community fork by JTCozart). Installing this repository lets Kodi automatically keep the skin up to date.
Helper for the FENtastic Plus Skin. Based on Fentastic Helper v0.6.20a.
Helper for the FENtastic Plus Skin. Based on Fentastic Helper v0.6.20a.
Helper for the FENtastic Plus Skin. Based on Fentastic Helper v0.6.20a.
